race.description: Darry’s Plumbing And Gas Maiden Hcp
race.comment: Moderate race is being kind. CLASSIC ROYALE (11) is better than last couple and won't get a better chance to break through. Both career placings have been here and looks well weighted with the claim. FLICK'N RUBIES (10) is another who won't find a better opportunity to find some form. Not far away at Narrogin two back then midfield at Ascot last time, beaten three lengths. Started big odds last time but returning a similar figure would go close this line-up. GREYT RUBY (7) was beaten just a length on debut in richer company then gave a big start and was never in it before another break. Blinkers added and can present sharper this campaign. FOREVER ELITE (5) was beaten six lengths at Ascot at her second outing and over the longer journey here can improve sharply. SO I THOUGHT (3) finished at the tail on debut at Pinjarra Scarpside and expect he's much better than that.
